title: TX10 Clock configuration (v1)
description: Versioned, strict, bounded host-side configuration contract for the TX10 Clock app. This document is the single source of truth for the config surface; the host-only validator in tools/config-validator enforces it plus fail-closed passes (duplicate keys, NaN/Infinity, byte-size limit) that plain JSON Schema does not express. It intentionally carries no visual geometry/tokens, no endpoints, and no device identity.

schemaVersion.description: Contract version. Must equal 1 for this schema; a mismatch fails closed rather than being coerced.

showSeconds.description: Whether the digital readout shows seconds.

showDate.description: Whether the date line is shown.

locale.description: Locale / timezone policy. Each field accepts either a device-delegated policy token or a shape-validated explicit value; unsafe input fails closed. Existence is deferred to the runtime — this contract validates safety and shape only, without shipping a timezone database.

timeZone.description: 'auto' delegates to the device zone. Otherwise an IANA-style zone id (e.g. 'UTC', 'Europe/London', 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires', 'Etc/GMT+5'). Path traversal, separators, whitespace, and shell metacharacters are rejected.

language.description: 'system' delegates to the device locale. Otherwise a BCP-47 language tag (e.g. 'en', 'en-US', 'pt-BR', 'zh-Hant-TW').

smoothSweep.description: Smooth (continuous) second-hand sweep when true; discrete one-second ticks when false.

burnInMitigation.description: OLED/LCD burn-in shift. Bounds here are behavioural safety limits, not accepted visual geometry.

shiftEnabled.description: Whether the whole scene is periodically nudged to spread pixel wear.

shiftRadiusPx.description: Maximum displacement of the periodic shift, in pixels. 0 disables movement even when shiftEnabled is true.

shiftIntervalSeconds.description: How often the scene is shifted, in seconds. Bounded to keep the effect gentle and infrequent.

keepScreenOn.description: Hold a wake lock so the clock never sleeps.

restoreOnBoot.description: Relaunch the clock automatically after device boot.

allowManualRefresh.description: Permit a manual redraw/refresh input. Off by default so the surface stays passive.
